Zone.description: The Zone that the device is located in. Specify the ID of an Availability Zone, Local Zone, Wavelength Zone, or an Outpost.

SubnetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the subnet that the device is located in.

CreatedAt.description: The date and time that the site was created.

Tags.description: The tags for the device.

DirectConnectGatewayAttachment.description: Shows details about the Direct Connect gateway attachment.

OwnerAccountId.description: The ID of the attachment account owner.

EdgeLocation.description: The Region where the edge is located. This is returned for all attachment types except a Direct Connect gateway attachment, which instead returns EdgeLocations.

EdgeLocations.description: The edge locations that the Direct Connect gateway is associated with. This is returned only for Direct Connect gateway attachments. All other attachment types retrun EdgeLocation.

AttachmentPolicyRuleNumber.description: The policy rule number associated with the attachment.

SegmentName.description: The name of the segment attachment.

NetworkFunctionGroupName.description: The name of the network function group.

Tags.description: The tags associated with the attachment.

ProposedSegmentChange.description: The attachment to move from one segment to another.

Tags.description: The list of key-value tags that changed for the segment.

AttachmentPolicyRuleNumber.description: The rule number in the policy document that applies to this change.

SegmentName.description: The name of the segment to change.

ProposedNetworkFunctionGroupChange.description: Describes a proposed change to a network function group associated with the attachment.

Tags.description: The list of proposed changes to the key-value tags associated with the network function group.

AttachmentPolicyRuleNumber.description: The proposed new attachment policy rule number for the network function group.

NetworkFunctionGroupName.description: The proposed name change for the network function group name.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp when the attachment was created.

UpdatedAt.description: The timestamp when the attachment was last updated.

LastModificationErrors.description: Describes the error associated with the attachment request.

NextToken.description: The token for the next page of results.

DeviceId.description: The device ID for the link association.

NextToken.description: The token for the next page of results.

LinkArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the link.

CreatedAt.description: The date and time that the link was created.

Tags.description: The tags for the link.

The token for the next page of results.
The token for the next page of results.

ResourceType.description:
The resource type.

The following are the supported resource types for Direct Connect:

  • dxcon

  • dx-gateway

  • dx-vif

The following are the supported resource types for Network Manager:

  • attachment

  • connect-peer

  • connection

  • core-network

  • device

  • link

  • peering

  • site

The following are the supported resource types for Amazon VPC:

  • customer-gateway

  • transit-gateway

  • transit-gateway-attachment

  • transit-gateway-connect-peer

  • transit-gateway-route-table

  • vpn-connection

Definition.description: Information about the resource, in JSON format. Network Manager gets this information by describing the resource using its Describe API call.

DefinitionTimestamp.description: The time that the resource definition was retrieved.

Tags.description: The tags.

DestinationCidrBlock.description: A unique identifier for the route, such as a CIDR block.

State.description: The route state. The possible values are active and blackhole.

Type.description: The route type. The possible values are propagated and static.

NextToken.description: The token for the next page of results.

Timestamp.description: The time the status was last updated.

OwnerAccountId.description: The ID of the AWS account that created the route analysis.

TransitGatewayAttachmentArn.description: The ARN of the transit gateway attachment.
The ARN of the transit gateway attachment.

IncludeReturnPath.description: Indicates whether to analyze the return path. The return path is not analyzed if the forward path analysis does not succeed.

UseMiddleboxes.description: Indicates whether to include the location of middlebox appliances in the route analysis.

CompletionStatus.description: The status of the analysis at completion.

ResultCode.description: The result of the analysis. If the status is NOT_CONNECTED, check the reason code.

ReasonCode.description:
The reason code. Available only if a connection is not found.

  • BLACKHOLE_ROUTE_FOR_DESTINATION_FOUND - Found a black hole route with the destination CIDR block.

  • CYCLIC_PATH_DETECTED - Found the same resource multiple times while traversing the path.

  • INACTIVE_ROUTE_FOR_DESTINATION_FOUND - Found an inactive route with the destination CIDR block.

  • MAX_HOPS_EXCEEDED - Analysis exceeded 64 hops without finding the destination.

  • ROUTE_NOT_FOUND - Cannot find a route table with the destination CIDR block.

  • TGW_ATTACH_ARN_NO_MATCH - Found an attachment, but not with the correct destination ARN.

  • TGW_ATTACH_NOT_FOUND - Cannot find an attachment.

  • TGW_ATTACH_NOT_IN_TGW - Found an attachment, but not to the correct transit gateway.

  • TGW_ATTACH_STABLE_ROUTE_TABLE_NOT_FOUND - The state of the route table association is not associated.

ReasonContext.description: Additional information about the path. Available only if a connection is not found.

CompletionStatus.description: The status of the analysis at completion.

ResultCode.description: The result of the analysis. If the status is NOT_CONNECTED, check the reason code.

ReasonCode.description:
The reason code. Available only if a connection is not found.

  • BLACKHOLE_ROUTE_FOR_DESTINATION_FOUND - Found a black hole route with the destination CIDR block.

  • CYCLIC_PATH_DETECTED - Found the same resource multiple times while traversing the path.

  • INACTIVE_ROUTE_FOR_DESTINATION_FOUND - Found an inactive route with the destination CIDR block.

  • MAX_HOPS_EXCEEDED - Analysis exceeded 64 hops without finding the destination.

  • ROUTE_NOT_FOUND - Cannot find a route table with the destination CIDR block.

  • TGW_ATTACH_ARN_NO_MATCH - Found an attachment, but not with the correct destination ARN.

  • TGW_ATTACH_NOT_FOUND - Cannot find an attachment.

  • TGW_ATTACH_NOT_IN_TGW - Found an attachment, but not to the correct transit gateway.

  • TGW_ATTACH_STABLE_ROUTE_TABLE_NOT_FOUND - The state of the route table association is not associated.

ApplianceModeSupport.description: Indicates whether appliance mode is supported. If enabled, traffic flow between a source and destination use the same Availability Zone for the VPC attachment for the lifetime of that flow. The default value is false.

SecurityGroupReferencingSupport.description: Indicates whether security group referencing is enabled for this VPC attachment. The default is true. However, at the core network policy-level the default is set to false.

AttachmentRoutingPolicyAssociations.description: The list of attachment routing policy associations.

NextToken.description: The token for the next page of results.

AttachmentId.description: The ID of the attachment associated with the routing policy.

PendingRoutingPolicies.description: The list of routing policies that are pending association with the attachment.

AssociatedRoutingPolicies.description: The list of routing policies currently associated with the attachment.

RoutingPolicyLabel.description: The routing policy label associated with the attachment.

NextToken.description: The token for the next page of results.

Alias.description: Whether a core network policy is the current policy or the most recently submitted policy.

Description.description: The description of a core network policy version.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp when a core network policy version was created.

ChangeSetState.description: The status of the policy version change set.

PrefixListAssociations.description: The list of prefix list associations for the core network.

LocalPreference.description: The BGP local preference value for the route.

Med.description: The BGP Multi-Exit Discriminator (MED) value for the route.

AsPath.description: The BGP AS path for the route.

Communities.description: The BGP community values for the route.

Key.description:
The tag key.

Constraints: Maximum length of 128 characters.

Value.description:
The tag value.

Constraints: Maximum length of 256 characters.

OrganizationStatus.description: The status of the service access update request for an Amazon Web Services Organization.

SLRDeploymentStatus.description: The status of the SLR deployment for the account. This will be either SUCCEEDED or IN_PROGRESS.

AccountStatusList.description: The current service-linked role (SLR) deployment status for an Amazon Web Services Organization's accounts. This will be either SUCCEEDED or IN_PROGRESS.
